channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fire emergency access and driveway blocked, 13th May
item.description:
Cars blocking access double Yellow blips
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 63 Canfield Gardens, 13th May
item.description:
This problem has been here since the installation of the fibre-optic cable by G network - it has subsided and been repaired and subsided again. When buses go over this pothole, my house shakes and the cracks are beginning to appear in the walls. Fixing it like last time is not going to work - it needs an area repair, not just someone tipping a bit of tar into the hole. This has been ongoing for more than a year now and needs urgent attention before my house, and others around me, suffer more damage. Please schedule this as very urgent.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Canfield Gardens, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping yet again, 13th May
item.description:
Beds and furniture been dumped again

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This information will be sent to Barnet Borough Council and will also be published online for others to see, in accordance with our privacy policy., 13th May
item.description:
Dear Barnet Council, Thank you for your response. I would like to clarify that this report is not about an unsafe or storm-damaged tree and is therefore not an emergency tree issue. The concern relates to the general condition and maintenance of the green space located on East End Road, at the corner with Park Farm Close, particularly the roadside flower beds and planting areas. The rose plants are heavily affected by aphids and appear unhealthy, and many of the bulb plants are in poor condition. The area looks neglected and would benefit from proper maintenance, treatment, and replanting of suitable, attractive, and long-lasting plants. This is a non-emergency environmental maintenance issue, not a hazardous tree situation. I would appreciate it if this could be forwarded to the relevant parks or landscaping team for review. I have attached photos for reference. Thank you for your time and assistance. Kind regards,

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Farm Close, Finchley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The branches on the trees are hanging so low you cant walk along the pavement without having to duck down., 13th May
item.description:
This has been getting worse for the last 2 weeks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Osborne Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pot holes surrounding metal drain covers, 13th May
item.description:
The potholes are very large. Everytime a heavy vehicles passes it's shaking my whole house now. I have multiple cracks in my plaster and my children are waking up at night crying. Please please fix these pot holes.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Footscray Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged wooden barrier, 13th May
item.description:
The wooden barrier on the median by the roundabout has been hit by a vehicle and severely damaged. This is at the roundabout on John Harrison Way at the junction with Chandlers Avenue

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): John Harrison Way, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large amounts of litter, 13th May
item.description:
On the verge by the on street parking in front of 22 & 24 John Harrison Way SE10 there is so much litter - can this be cleared? What3words: ///hangs.cabin.calls

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): John Harrison Way, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox cub double bagged and reported 4 days agio, 13th May
item.description:
Please would someone from the council come and remove the dead fox cub that we reported at the weekend.it is sitting on the pavement outside our property - 110 Kingsway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingsway, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Fridge Freezer and Mattresses, 13th May
item.description:
These have been limping around dumped here for about a week in front of Block 1-30 Arnold Estate. Fly -tipping black spot. Please clear.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 49a/b Melbourne Grove-Flytipping, 13th May
item.description:
Left bags of refuse on the pavement. Needs to be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48, Melbourne Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking on Guild Roaf, 13th May
item.description:
A lot of non residents are coming to park on Guild Road. This situation is making it difficult to drive in especially the area leading to Fairview road The residents in the new flats are coming to park on Guild Road. Please do something like residence permit holders Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Guild Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Heavy commercial waste dumped into this blue bin, 13th May
item.description:
Someone has tipped heavy commercial waste into this bin . This must have been since bin was emptied this morning,

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-8, Chadwick Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden waste, 13th May
item.description:
Despite purchasing the garden waste bags and contacting the council, they haven't come and pick them up recently
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37-54, Forsyth Gardens, Elephant and Castle, Greater London

item.title: Swift cars, 13th May
item.description:
New fridge dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dyne Road, London

item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: New Dog poo left daily on balcorne street, 13th May
item.description:
Happens all the time as people use route to the park
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Balcorne Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside GA BAR entrance, in the carriageway close to the kerb, 13th May
item.description:
There is a significant pothole here, close to the kerb, which forces cyclists to pull out approx 2 metres into the carriageway to avoid it. This is very dangerous on Euston Road which is very busy with aggressive traffic
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Euston Road, Somers Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown trees, 13th May
item.description:
The trees from this corner garden are so overgrown they're obstructing the pavement. It's even more obvious since this sign in place since last week. They also stick out on Warwick Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warwick Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chairs and other objects at the side of our house., 13th May
item.description:
Hi i am the resident of 50 Bendmore Avenue, and i have noticed that someone has left a few household items at the side of my house. The rubbish is very visible to everyone and is disrupting the pedestrians who walk along the road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Manton Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tenants at N 19 blocking everyone with inappropriate parking on the road, 13th May
item.description:
Hazard to everyone Obstruction Blocking vehicles

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Rydal Drive, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
